headline: United Rentals to Report Q1 Earnings: What Investors Need to Know
summary: URI's Q1 results are likely to reflect stable non-residential construction demand amid weakness in residential and softness in office/retail.

headline: Should You Buy Comfort Systems Stock Ahead of Q1 Earnings?
summary: Will FIX's record $11.94B backlog and surging data center demand power another earnings beat when it reports Q1 results on April 23 after the close?
